message:
feat(web): add notification UI components (flywheel_gateway-59c)

Add comprehensive notification UI system:
- NotificationBadge: Unread count badge with pulse animation
- NotificationItem: Individual notification display with priority indicators
- NotificationList: Scrollable list with filtering, grouping, pagination
- NotificationCenter: Main notification hub combining all components
- NotificationPreferencesPanel: Settings for notification preferences
- Enhanced useNotifications hook with utility functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
